positive: A vibrant, symmetrical illustration of a stylized celestial map and fauna arrangement. The main subject is a majestic, stylized crescent moon cradling a cluster of zodiac constellations and mythical forest creatures, such as a stylized owl, leaping fox, and ethereal stag. Use Art Nouveau and celestial gothic aesthetics, featuring intricate line work, highly contrasting silhouettes, and elements resembling vintage etched copperplate prints. The color palette should be deep midnight blues, iridescent golds, deep teals, and matte sepia tones, emphasizing clean, sharp lines perfect for apparel printing. Composition must be centered and highly detailed, suitable for a full chest print.
negative: blur, deformed, poorly drawn, watermark, text, signature, low resolution, artifacts, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, dirty, muted, gradient, photo, photorealistic, logos
